summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Privacy Protection (Screen Capture Prevention) feature. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend components (useScreenProtection hook, ScreenProtectionOverlay, ProtectedContent) are properly integrated in LiveStreamViewer and ControlPanel.
passed_tests: Backend: Escalation policy thresholds correctly implemented (1-2=warn, 3-4=end_session, 5+=suspend_30d)
Backend: Security events contain all required fields (id, user_id, event_id, capture_type, os, action_taken, timestamp)
Backend: Response messages are appropriate for each action level
Frontend: useScreenProtection hook properly imported in LiveStreamViewer
Frontend: useScreenProtection hook properly imported in ControlPanel
Frontend: ScreenProtectionOverlay component renders in LiveStreamViewer
Frontend: ScreenProtectionOverlay component renders in ControlPanel
Frontend: ProtectedContent wrapper applied to video content
Frontend: Hook detects Win+Shift+S (Windows Snipping Tool)
Frontend: Hook detects getDisplayMedia API calls (screen sharing)
Frontend: Hook detects visibility change (tab hidden)
Frontend: Control Panel loads and shows streaming controls
Frontend: Event page shows 'Content protected • Recording disabled' indicator
critical_code_review_comments: Security endpoints are well-implemented with proper authentication and authorization
Escalation policy correctly implements warn → end_session → suspend_30d → permanent_ban flow
Frontend hook correctly detects multiple screenshot/recording methods across OS platforms
ScreenProtectionOverlay shows appropriate severity levels based on violation count
ProtectedContent wrapper applies blur effect when isProtected=true
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with 5+ violations. Suspension was lifted by admin during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Privacy Protection feature is fully functional. Test user 'test-creator-1771782673812' has multiple violations logged. Admin can view violations at /api/security/violations/{user_id} and lift suspensions at /api/security/lift-suspension/{user_id}. Frontend components useScreenProtection, ScreenProtectionOverlay, and ProtectedContent are integrated in LiveStreamViewer.jsx and ControlPanel.jsx.
